summary: Phase 8 testing completed successfully. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly. Fixed 3 minor bugs during testing.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/departments without current_user_id returns 403
Backend: POST /api/departments with admin user returns 403
Backend: POST /api/departments with superadmin succeeds
Backend: PUT /api/departments requires superadmin
Backend: DELETE /api/departments requires superadmin
Backend: POST mark-defective with non-admin performed_by returns 403
Backend: POST mark-defective with future defective_at returns 400
Backend: POST mark-defective with short remarks returns 400
Backend: POST mark-defective with admin/SA succeeds
Backend: Mark-defective creates synthetic inspection (type='manual_marking')
Backend: Mark-defective creates orange list entry
Backend: Mark-defective sends notifications (6 people notified)
Backend: Mark-defective preserves defective_since when asset already defective
Backend: GET /api/orange-list?for_user_id=<supervisor> returns scoped list (0 items)
Backend: GET /api/orange-list?for_user_id=<asup> returns station-scoped list (14 items)
Backend: GET /api/orange-list?for_user_id=<ro> returns dept+station-scoped list (8 items)
Backend: GET /api/orange-list (no for_user_id) returns all items (14 items)
Frontend: Login as Super Admin works
Frontend: Admin Panel Departments tab accessible
Frontend: Add Department button visible for Super Admin only
Frontend: Department CRUD form submission works
Frontend: Asset Registry 3-dot menu opens
Frontend: Mark defective option visible (admin only)
Frontend: Mark Defective dialog opens and renders correctly
Frontend: Mark Defective form can be filled and submitted
Frontend: Orange List page loads
Frontend: Refresh button works on Orange List
Frontend: No React runtime errors on Dashboard
Frontend: No React runtime errors on Assets page
Frontend: No React runtime errors on Admin page
Frontend: No React runtime errors on Orange List page
Frontend: No 'Objects are not valid as a React child' errors anywhere
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.js - Added missing useAuth import and user destructuring
